channel.title: Chinese Semiotic Studies
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Chinese Semiotic Studies

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Nevia Dolcini, Veronica Valle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/css-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: Lotmanian referentiality and (cultural) semantics

item.title: Extending the domain of interpersonal rhetoric in linguistic pragmatics through interactional properties of communication participants
item.description: Article by Nevia Dolcini, Veronica Valle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/css-2024-2027

item.title: Coffee shop-naming practices in Shanghai
item.description: Article by Nevia Dolcini, Veronica Valle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/css-2024-2028

item.title: Comparative semiotics of womanhood: portrayal of Chinese and Pakistani women in contemporary paintings
item.description: Article by Nevia Dolcini, Veronica Valle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/css-2024-2029

item.title: Metaphorical meanings of color symbols in literature
item.description: Article by Nevia Dolcini, Veronica Valle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/css-2024-2030

item.title: Heroines in the East and the West: a comparative semiotic study of female imagery in the anti-pandemic discourse of Italy and China
item.description: Article by Nevia Dolcini, Veronica Valle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/css-2024-2031
